notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Jake Bauers. Otto Lopez to 2nd. Liam Hicks out at 3rd, catcher William Contreras to third baseman Luis Rengifo. Otto Lopez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Xavier Edwards. William Contreras to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brice Turang GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brice Turang grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. Brice Turang out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Brice Turang out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez out at 1st.
